name: A Place For Us
description:
While healing another Survivor, you both gain {Keyword.Elusive}.

Whenever you finish healing the Obsession, you both gain {Keyword.Elusive} for {Tunable.S52P02.EffectDuration}s.

When the trial starts, you are less likely to be the Obsession.

name: Ace in the Hole
description:
Whenever you loot an item from a Chest, it will have:
  • A Visceral or lower rarity add-on.
  • {Tunable.S07P03.ModifyChestItemSecondAddonChance%}% chance for an Uncommon or lower rarity add-on.


When you escape, you keep your add-ons.

name: Adrenaline
description:
When all Generators are completed, if you are downed or injured, heal instantly. Then, ignoring {Keyword.Exhausted}:
  • You gain {Tunable.S02P03.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.S02P03.HasteDuration}s.
  • You gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.S02P03.ExhaustionDuration}s.

name: Aftercare
description:
You and up to {Tunable.S15P02.MaxSurvivors} Survivors see each other's Auras whenever:
  • You unhook them, or they unhook you.
  • You finish healing them, or they finish healing you.


This effect lasts until you are hooked.

name: Alert
description:
Whenever the Killer breaks a Pallet or Breakable Wall, or damages a Generator:
  • You hear a sound cue.
  • You see their Aura for {Tunable.S09P03.AuraRevealDuration}s.

name: Any Means Necessary
description:
While next to a Dropped Pallet, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} for {Tunable.S20P02.ActionTimeRequired}s to reset it.

You see the Auras of Dropped Pallets.

name: Apocalyptic Ingenuity
description:
After you rummage or unlock {Tunable.S47P01.ChestsRequired} Chests, while next to a Broken Pallet, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} for {Tunable.S47P01.InteractionDuration}s to create a Fragile Pallet.

Within {Tunable.S47P01.BrokenPalletsRevealDistance}m, you see the Auras of Broken Pallets.

name: Appraisal
description:
When the trial starts, you earn {Tunable.S24P01.StartingTokens} Tokens.

Spend {Tunable.S24P01.TokensPerRummage} Token to rummage an empty Chest, up to {Tunable.S24P01.MaxRummagesPerChest} times per Chest.

You rummage Chests {Tunable.S24P01.ChestSearchSpeedBonus%}% faster.

name: Autodidact
description:
You start the trial with {Tunable.S14P03.StartingTokens} Tokens, up to {Tunable.S14P03.MaxToken}, and your good basic healing Skill Checks give {Tunable.S14P03.InitialProgressionPenalty%}% less progress.

While healing without a Med-Kit:
  • Whenever you hit a basic Skill Check, you earn {Tunable.S14P03.TokensPerSkillCheck} token.
  • Whenever you hit a basic Skill Check, for each Token, you gain {Tunable.S14P03.ProgressionBonusPerToken%}% more progress.
  • You cannot get great basic Skill Checks.

name: Babysitter
description:
Whenever you unhook a Survivor:
  • They gain {Tunable.S18P01.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.S18P01.HasteDuration}s.
  • They leave no Pools of Blood for {Tunable.S18P01.StealthDuration}s.
  • They leave no Scratch Marks for {Tunable.S18P01.StealthDuration}s.
  • You see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S18P01.AuraRevealDuration}s.

name: Background Player
description:
Whenever the Killer picks-up another Survivor, for the next {Tunable.S36P01.EffectDuration}s, when you start running:
  • Gain {Tunable.S36P01.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.S36P01.HasteDuration}s.
  • Gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.S36P01.ExhaustedDuration}s.

name: Bada Bada Boom
description:
After repairing {Tunable.S50P01.RequiredGeneratorProgress%}% of Generators, while next to a Window, use {Input.ActivatableButton2} to trap it for {Tunable.S50P01.TrapDuration}s. All Survivors see that Window's Aura for that time.

When the Killer vaults that Window, the trap explodes and they gain {Tunable.S50P01.TrapHinder%}% {Keyword.Hindered} for {Tunable.S50P01.HinderDuration}s.

name: Balanced Landing
description:
Whenener you fall from at least {Tunable.S05P01.RequiredFallHeight}m:
  • You gain {Tunable.S05P01.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.S05P01.HasteDuration}s.
  • You gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.S05P01.ExhaustionDuration}s.
  • Your stagger is {Tunable.S05P01.FallStaggerReduction%}% shorter.
  • Your Grunts from falling are {Tunable.S05P01.FallGruntReduction%}% quieter.

name: Bardic Inspiration
description:
While idle, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to perform, empowering all Survivors within {Tunable.S42P02.PerformanceDistance}m for up to {Tunable.S42P02.PerformanceDuration}s. While you are performing, other Survivors will see your Aura. Roll a d20:
  • 1 | You scream, but nothing happens.
  • 2-10 | Basic Skill Checks give +{Tunable.S42P02.LowRollBonus%}% progress.
  • 11-19 | Basic Skill Checks give +{Tunable.S42P02.MidRollBonus%}% progress.
  • 20 | Basic Skill Checks give +{Tunable.S42P02.HighRollBonus%}% progress.


If you complete the performance, this effect ends after {Tunable.S42P02.EffectDuration}s. Cooldown: {Tunable.S42P02.Cooldown}s.

name: Better Than New
description:
Whenever you finish healing another Survivor, until they take damage:
  • They bless and cleanse {Tunable.S33P01.ActionSpeedBonus%}% faster.
  • They heal {Tunable.S33P01.ActionSpeedBonus%}% faster.
  • They unlock Chests {Tunable.S33P01.ActionSpeedBonus%}% faster.

name: Better Together
description:
While you are repairing a Generator:
  • Other Survivors see that Generator's Aura.
  • Whenever the Killer downs a Survivor, you see the Auras of all Survivors for {Tunable.S19P01.AuraRevealDuration}s.

name: Bite the Bullet
description:
While healing, you and the healed Survivor make no noises or Grunts of Pain. Whenever you miss a basic Skill Check:
  • You lose only {Tunable.S27P01.OverrideHealFailPenalty%}% progress.
  • The Killer is not alerted.

name: Blast Mine
description:
After repairing {Tunable.S26P03.RequiredProgress%}% of Generators, while next to a Generator, use {Input.ActivatableButton2} to trap it for {Tunable.S26P03.TrapDuration}s. All Survivors see that Generator's Aura for that time.

When the Killer damages that Generator, the trap explodes, then:
  • They are stunned for {Tunable.S26P03.StunBlindDuration}s.
  • Everyone nearby looking at the detonation is blinded.

name: Blood Pact
description:
While you are not the Obsession:
  • While you or the Obsession are injured, you see each other's Auras.
  • Whenever you finish healing the Obsession, or they finish healing you, while within {Tunable.S22P02.RequiredDistance}m of each other, you both gain {Tunable.S22P02.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste}.


When the trial starts, you are less likely to be the Obsession.

name: Blood Rush
description:
Until all Generators are completed, whenever you are unhooked, for the next {Tunable.S36P02.EffectDuration}s, while {Keyword.Exhausted}, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to lose {Keyword.Exhausted} instantly.

This is disabled by conspicuous actions.

name: Boil Over
description:
While carried by the Killer:
  • Whenever the Killer falls from at least {Tunable.S13P03.RequiredFallHeight}m, you gain {Tunable.S13P03.FallExtraWiggle%}% of your current wiggle progress.
  • Your wiggle is {Tunable.S13P03.WiggleIntensity%}% stronger.
  • Within {Tunable.S13P03.HookAuraBlockRange}m, the Killer cannot see Hook Auras.

name: Bond
description: Within {Tunable.S01P01.AuraRevealDistance}m, you see other Survivors' Auras.

name: Boon: Circle of Healing
description:
While next to a totem, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to bless it, creating a unique Boon Totem that combines all your Boons.

Survivors within the Boon's range:
  • While healing without a Med-Kit, they heal others {Tunable.S28P02.HealingSpeedBonus%}% faster.
  • While injured, other Survivors see their Aura.

name: Boon: Dark Theory
description:
While next to a totem, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to bless it, creating a unique Boon Totem that combines all your Boons.

Survivors within the Boon's range gain {Tunable.S30P03.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste}. When leaving the range, this ends after {Tunable.S30P03.LingerDuration}s.

name: Boon: Exponential
description:
While next to a totem, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to bless it, creating a unique Boon totem that combines all your Boons.

Downed Survivors within the Boon's range:
  • Recover {Tunable.S29P03.RecoverSpeedBoost%}% faster.
  • Can fully recover.

name: Boon: Illumination
description:
While next to a totem, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to bless it, creating a unique Boon totem that combines all your Boons.

Survivors within the Boon's range:
  • See the Auras of Chests.
  • See the Auras of Generators.


While you have a Boon Totem, you bless and cleanse {Tunable.S40P02.ActionSpeed%}% faster.

name: Boon: Shadow Step
description:
While next to a Totem, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to bless it, creating a unique Boon Totem that combines all your Boons. Survivors within the Boon's range:
  • Leave no Scratch Marks.
  • Their Auras cannot be seen by the Killer.


When leaving the range, this ends after {Tunable.S28P03.LingerDuration}s.

name: Borrowed Time
description:
Whenever you unhook a Survivor:
  • They retain their unhook {Keyword.Endurance} for {Tunable.S08P02.EnduranceExtraDuration}s longer.
  • They retain their unhook {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.S08P02.HasteExtraDuration}s longer.

name: Botany Knowledge
description: You heal {Tunable.S03P02.ActionSpeed%}% faster.

name: Breakdown
description:
Whenever you are unhooked:
  • The Hook breaks, then is repaired after {Tunable.S15P01.HookRespawnTime}s.
  • You see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S15P01.AuraRevealDuration}s.

name: Breakout
description:
Within {Tunable.S20P03.RequiredDistance}m of a carried Survivor:
  • You gain {Tunable.S20P03.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste}.
  • The carried Survivor wiggles {Tunable.S20P03.ExtraWiggle%}% faster.

name: Buckle Up
description:
While healing a downed Survivor, you both see the Killer's Aura.

Whenever you finish healing a downed Survivor or fully recover:
  • The Survivor gains {Tunable.S17P02.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.S17P02.HasteDuration}s.
  • The Survivor leaves no Scratch Marks for {Tunable.S17P02.HasteDuration}s.

name: Built to Last
description:
While holding a depleted item, after hiding in a Locker for {Tunable.S23P03.RequiredDuration}s, it is recharged to {Tunable.S23P03.InitialRefill%}%.

Each time you recharge an item this way, it recharges {Tunable.S23P03.RefillDiminishing%}% fewer Charges.

name: Calm Spirit
description:
You do not scare Crows or scream.

You bless and cleanse Totems, and unlock Chests silently, but {Tunable.S04P02.ActionSpeedReduction%}% slower.

name: Camaraderie
description: While you are struggling on Hook, when another Survivor gets within {Tunable.S18P02.PauseDistance}m, the timer is paused for {Tunable.S18P02.PauseTimer}s.

name: Champion of Light
description:
While you are using a Flashlight, you gain {Tunable.S40P01.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste}.

Whenever you blind the Killer, they gain {Tunable.S40P01.Hindered%}% {Keyword.Hindered} for {Tunable.S40P01.HinderedDuration}s. Cooldown: {Tunable.S40P01.Cooldown}s.

name: Change of Plan
description:
When the trial starts, you earn {Tunable.S50P02.StartingTokens} Tokens.

While hiding in a Locker and holding a non-event Toolbox, use {Input.ActivatableButton2} and spend 1 Token to transform your Toolbox and add-ons into a Med-Kit of the same rarity with {Tunable.S50P02.RecoveredCharges%}% Charges and random add-ons of the same rarity.

name: Chemical Trap
description:
After repairing {Tunable.S39P02.RequiredProgress%}% of Generators, while next to a Dropped Pallet, use {Input.ActivatableButton2} to trap it for {Tunable.S39P02.TrapDuration}s. All Survivors see that Pallet's Aura for that time.

When the Killer breaks that Pallet, the trap explodes and they gain {Tunable.S39P02.Hinder%}% {Keyword.Hindered} for {Tunable.S39P02.HinderDuration}s.

name: Clairvoyance
description:
Whenever you bless or cleanse a Totem, while not holding an item, use {Input.UseItem} to, for up to {Tunable.S28P01.AuraRevealDuration}s and within {Tunable.S28P01.AuraRevealDistance}m:
  • See the Auras of Chests.
  • See the Auras of Exit Gate Switches.
  • See the Auras of Generators.
  • See the Aura of the Hatch.
  • See the Auras of Hooks.

name: Clean Break
description:
Whenever you finish healing another Survivor, while being healed by another Survivor, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to gain {Keyword.Broken}.

After {Tunable.S45P02.TimeOfHeal}s, if you are not downed, you are instantly healed.

name: Come and Get Me!
description:
Whenever you unhook a Survivor, while crouched and idle, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to make injured and downed Survivors within {Tunable.S47P02.EffectDistance}m:
  • Leave no Pools of Blood for {Tunable.S47P02.EffectDuration}s.
  • Leave no Scratch Marks for {Tunable.S47P02.EffectDuration}s.


You scream, then the Killer sees your Aura for {Tunable.S47P02.AuraRevealDuration}s.

name: Conviction
description:
After you finish healing {Tunable.S48P01.RequiredHealthStates} other Survivor, while downed with at least {Tunable.S48P01.RecoverProgressNeeded%}% recovery, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to recover instantly.

You gain {Keyword.Broken}, then, after {Tunable.S48P01.EffectDuration}s, you are downed instantly.

name: Corrective Action
description:
When the trial starts, you earn {Tunable.S29P02.StartingTokens} Tokens, up to {Tunable.S29P02.MaxTokens}.

Whenever you hit a great basic Skill Check, earn {Tunable.S29P02.TokensGainedPerGreat} Token.

Whenever another Survivor misses a basic Skill Check, spend {Tunable.S29P02.TokensSpentPerMiss} Token:
  • The missed Skill Check becomes a good Skill Check.
  • You see that Survivor's Aura for {Tunable.S29P02.AuraRevealDuration}s.

name: Counterforce
description:
When the trial starts, you earn {Tunable.S26P01.StartingTokens} Token.

Whenever you cleanse a Totem, earn {Tunable.S26P01.TokensPerCleanse} Token, then, you see the Aura of the farthest Totem for {Tunable.S26P01.AuraRevealDuration}s.

For each Token, you cleanse Totems {Tunable.S26P01.StackableCleanseSpeed%}% faster.

name: Cut Loose
description:
While chased by the Killer, whenever you medium or fast-vault:
  • For up to {Tunable.S35P01.StealthDuration}s, your medium and fast vaults are silent.
  • During that time, whenever you medium or fast-vault, the timer is reset.


Cooldown: {Tunable.S35P01.Cooldown}s.

name: Dance With Me
description: Whenever you fast-exit a Locker, medium-vault, or fast-vault, you leave no Scratch Marks for {Tunable.S13P01.Duration}s. Cooldown: {Tunable.S13P01.Cooldown}s.

name: Dark Sense
description: Whenever a Generator is completed, when the Killer gets within {Tunable.SG_Dark_Sense.AuraRevealDistance}m of you, you see their Aura for {Tunable.SG_Dark_Sense.AuraRevealDuration}s.

name: Dead Hard
description:
Whenever you are unhooked, while injured and running, use {Input.ActivatableButton1}:
  • You gain {Keyword.Endurance} for {Tunable.S10P02.EnduranceDuration}s.
  • You gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.S10P02.ExhaustedDuration}s.

name: Deadline
description:
While injured, basic Skill Checks:
  • Are {Tunable.S40P03.ExtraSkillCheckChance%}% more likely to appear.
  • Appear in random places.


Whenever you miss a basic Skill Check, you lose {Tunable.S40P03.FailureMitigation%}% less progress.

name: Deception
description:
Whenever you attempt to fast-enter a Locker:
  • You do not enter the Locker.
  • The Killer is alerted.
  • You leave no Scratch Marks for {Tunable.S24P02.NoScratchMarksDuration}s.


Cooldown: {Tunable.S24P02.Cooldown}s.

name: Decisive Strike
description:
Until all Generators are completed, whenever you are unhooked, for the next {Tunable.S06P02.EffectDuration}s: when the Killer picks you up, once per trial, hit a Special Skill check:
  • Stun the Killer for {Tunable.S06P02.StunDuration}s.
  • Become the Obsession.


This is disabled by conspicuous actions. At the start of the trial, you are more likely to be the Obsession.

name: Deja Vu
description: You see the Auras of the {Tunable.SG_Deja_Vu.GeneratorsShown} Generators closest to each other and repair them {Tunable.SG_Deja_Vu.RepairSpeed%}% faster.

name: Deliverance
description: Once per trial, when you safely unhook another Survivor, you can unhook yourself. When you unhook yourself this way, you gain {Keyword.Broken} for {Tunable.S14P02.BrokenDuration}s.

name: Desperate Measures
description:
For each injured, downed, or hooked Survivor:
  • You heal {Tunable.S23P02.ExtraActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • You unhook {Tunable.S23P02.ExtraActionSpeed%}% faster.

name: Detective's Hunch
description:
Whenever a Generator is completed, for {Tunable.S12P02.RevealDuration}s, within {Tunable.S12P02.RevealDistance}m of you:
  • You see the Auras of Chests.
  • You see the Auras of Generators.
  • You see the Auras of Totems.

name: Distortion
description:
When the trial starts, and after being chased for {Tunable.S15P03.RegainTokenDuration}s, you earn {Tunable.S15P03.TokensRegained} Token, up to {Tunable.S15P03.MaxTokens}.

While not downed, whenever the Killer attempts to see your Aura, spend {Tunable.S15P03.StartingTokenAmount} Token. Then, for the next {Tunable.S15P03.HiddenDuration}s:
  • The Killer cannot see your Aura.
  • You leave no Scratch Marks.

name: Diversion
description:
After hiding for {Tunable.S14P01.RequiredChargeTime}s within the Killer's Terror Radius, while crouched and idle, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to throw a pebble {Tunable.S14P01.ThrowDistance}m away:
  • The Killer is alerted.
  • The pebble leaves Scratch Marks.

name: Do No Harm
description:
While healing another Survivor:
  • For each Hook State they have, you heal {Tunable.S46P01.HealSpeedBonus%}% faster.
  • Whenever you hit a great basic Skill Check, you gain {Tunable.S46P01.GreatSkillCheckBonus%}% more progress.

name: Dramaturgy
description:
While healthy and running, use {Input.ActivatableButton1}:
  • You gain {Tunable.S38P01.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.S38P01.HasteDuration}s.
  • You gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.S38P01.ExhaustionDuration}s.


Then, one happens at random:
  • You gain {Tunable.S38P01.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.S38P01.HasteDuration}s.
  • You gain {Keyword.Exposed} for {Tunable.S38P01.ExposedDuration}s.
  • You gain a random rare item with random add-ons.
  • You scream, but nothing happens.


The same effect cannot happen twice in a row.

name: Duty of Care
description: While healthy, whenever you take a protection hit, other Survivors within {Tunable.S46P02.MaxDistance}m gain {Tunable.S46P02.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.S46P02.HasteDuration}s.

name: Empathic Connection
description:
You heal other Survivors {Tunable.S30P02.HealingBonus%}% faster.

Injured Survivors see your Aura.

name: Empathy
description: Within {Tunable.S03P01.AuraRevealDistance}m, you see the Auras of injured Survivors.

name: Extrasensory Perception
description:
After crouching for {Tunable.S51P01.CrouchActivationTime}s:
  • You see Auras in an expanding radius up to {Tunable.S51P01.MaxDistance}m.
  • You gain {Keyword.Elusive}.
  • You gain {Keyword.Oblivious}.


When you stop crouching, or after {Tunable.S51P01.MaxActiveListeningUptime}s, cooldown: {Tunable.S51P01.Cooldown}s.

name: Exultation
description:
Whenever you Pallet-stun the Killer:
  • Your item rarity is upgraded to the next tier, if possible.
  • If the item was upgraded, it recharges {Tunable.S44P02.ItemRecharge%}% Charges.


Cooldown: {Tunable.S44P02.Cooldown}s.

name: Eyes of Belmont
description:
Whenever a Generator is completed, you see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S44P01.AuraRevealDuration}s.

Whenever you see the Killer's Aura for a duration, it is {Tunable.S44P01.AuraRevealBonusDuration}s longer.

name: Fast Track
description:
Whenever you unhook another Survivor, you earn {Tunable.S25P01.TokensPerHook} Token, up to {Tunable.S25P01.MaxTokens}.

While repairing, whenever you hit a great basic Skill Check, spend all Tokens. For each Token spent, the Generator gains {Tunable.S25P01.BonusPerToken%}% permanent progress.

name: Finesse
description:
While healthy, you fast-vault {Tunable.S43P01.VaultSpeedIncrease%}% faster.

Whenever you fast-vault, cooldown: {Tunable.S43P01.Cooldown}s.

name: Five Moves Ahead
description:
While you are in the Killer's Terror Radius or chased by the Killer:
  • You see the Auras of the {Tunable.S52P03.PalletWindowAuraCount} closest Pallets and Windows.
  • After you drop a Pallet, you start moving {Tunable.S52P03.ActionSpeedBuff%}% earlier.
  • Whenever you drop a Pallet, cooldown: {Tunable.S52P03.Cooldown}s.

name: Fixated
description:
While walking, you gain {Tunable.S19P02.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste}.

You see your own Scratch Marks.

name: Flashbang
description:
After repairing {Tunable.S27P02.RequiredProgressToCraft%}% of Generators, while hiding in a Locker, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to craft a Flashbang.

When you use the Flashbang:
  • Everyone nearby looking at the detonation is blinded.
  • The Killer is alerted.

name: Flip-Flop
description: While downed, whenever the Killer picks you up, {Tunable.S17P01.RecoveryRatio%}% of your recovery progress is added to your wiggle progress, up to {Tunable.S17P01.MaxWiggle%}%.

name: Flow State
description:
Whenever a Generator is completed, earn {Tunable.S52P01.TokensPerGenerator} Token, up to {Tunable.S52P01.MaxTokens}.

For each Token:
  • You bless and cleanse {Tunable.S52P01.ActionSpeedBuff%}% faster.
  • You heal {Tunable.S52P01.ActionSpeedBuff%}% faster.
  • You unhook Survivors {Tunable.S52P01.ActionSpeedBuff%}% faster.

name: Fogwise
description: While repairing, whenever you hit a great basic Skill Check, you see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S34P02.AuraRevealDuration}s.

name: For the People
description:
While healthy and healing another Survivor without a Med-Kit, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to heal them instantly:
  • You take damage.
  • You gain {Keyword.Broken} for {Tunable.S21P03.BrokenDuration}s.
  • You become the Obsession.


When the trial starts, you are less likely to be the Obsession.

name: Friendly Competition
description: Whenever you finish repairing a Generator with at least 1 other Survivor, Survivors who finished repairing it repair {Tunable.S35P02.ExtraRepairSpeed%}% faster for {Tunable.S35P02.BoostDuration}s.

name: Ghost Notes
description:
While you have {Keyword.Exhausted}, your Scratch Marks disappear {Tunable.S49P03.ScratchmarksTimeReduction%}% faster.

You lose {Keyword.Exhausted} {Tunable.S49P03.CooldownReduction%}% faster.

name: Hardened
description: When you have blessed or cleansed a Totem and unlocked a Chest, whenever you would scream, you see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S43P02.AuraRevealDuration}s instead.

name: Head On
description: After hiding in a Locker for {Tunable.S16P03.HideRequiredDuration}s, fast-exit to stun the Killer for {Tunable.S16P03.LockerStunDuration}s if they are within {Tunable.S16P03.LockerStunRange}m, then gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.S16P03.ExhaustedDuration}s.

name: Hope
description: When all Generators are completed, you gain {Tunable.SG_Hope.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste}.

name: Hyperfocus
description:
Whenever you hit a great basic Skill Check, you earn {Tunable.S33P03.TokensPerGreat} Token, up to {Tunable.S33P03.MaxTokens}.

For each Token, basic Skill Checks:
  • Appear {Tunable.S33P03.SkillCheckBonusChance%}% more often.
  • Spin {Tunable.S33P03.SkillCheckSpeedIncrease%}% faster.
  • Whenever you hit a great, give {Tunable.S33P03.SkillCheckBonusPerToken%}% more progress.


Whenever you miss a basic Skill Check, hit a good Skill Check, or stop healing or repairing, lose all Tokens.

name: Inner Focus
description:
Whenever the Killer damages another Survivor, you see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S31P01.AuraRevealDuration}s.

You see other Survivors' Scratch Marks.

name: Inner Strength
description: Whenever you cleanse a Totem, while injured and not {Keyword.Broken}, after hiding in a Locker for {Tunable.S19P03.HideDuration}s, you become healthy instantly.

name: Invocation: Treacherous Crows
description:
While in the Basement next to the circle, use {Input.ActivatableButton2} to invoke. While invoking, other Survivors see your Aura and can join your Invocation.

When the Invocation is completed:
  • Whenever the Killer scares a Crow while a Survivor is in their Terror Radius, all Survivors see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S45P01.AuraRevealDuration}s.
  • You become injured.
  • You gain {Keyword.Broken}.


Each Invocation can only be completed once per trial.

name: Invocation: Weaving Spiders
description:
While in the Basement next to the circle, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to invoke. While invoking, other Survivors see your Aura and can join your Invocation.

When the Invocation is completed:
  • All Generators gain {Tunable.S41P01.GeneratorChargeReduction} permanent charges.
  • You become injured.
  • You gain {Keyword.Broken}.


Each Invocation can only be completed once per trial.

name: Iron Will
description: While injured and not {Keyword.Exhausted}, your Grunts of Pain are {Tunable.S04P01.InjuredNoiseReduction%}% quieter.

name: Kindred
description:
While you are hooked, all Survivors see each others' Auras. While the Killer is within {Tunable.SG_Kindred.AuraRevealDistance}m, all Survivors sees the Killer's Aura.

While another Survivor is hooked, you see the Auras of other Survivors. While the Killer is within {Tunable.SG_Kindred.AuraRevealDistance}m of the hooked Survivor, you see the Killer's Aura.

name: Last Stand
description: After hiding for {Tunable.S48P02.ActivationTime}s within the Killer's Terror Radius, when you fast-vault, once per trial, stun the Killer for {Tunable.S48P02.StunDuration}s if they are within {Tunable.S48P02.StunRange}m.

name: Leader
description:
Within {Tunable.S01P02.Range}m of you, other Survivors:
  • Cleanse Totems {Tunable.S01P02.ActionSpeedModifier%}% faster.
  • Heal {Tunable.S01P02.ActionSpeedModifier%}% faster.
  • Open Exit Gates {Tunable.S01P02.ActionSpeedModifier%}% faster.
  • Sabotage Hooks {Tunable.S01P02.ActionSpeedModifier%}% faster.
  • Unhook Survivors {Tunable.S01P02.ActionSpeedModifier%}% faster.
  • Unlock Chests {Tunable.S01P02.ActionSpeedModifier%}% faster.


After they leave your range, this ends after {Tunable.S01P02.LingerDuration}s.

name: Left Behind
description: When all other Survivors are dead, while within {Tunable.S08P01.HatchRevealDistance}m of the Hatch, you see its Aura.

name: Light-footed
description:
While healthy and running, your footsteps are silent to the Killer.

Whenever you do a fast-action, cooldown: {Tunable.S39P03.Cooldown}s.

name: Lightweight
description: Your Scratch Marks disappear {Tunable.SG_Lightweight.ScratchmarksTimeReduction}s faster and appear more spread out.

name: Lithe
description:
Whenever you medium or fast-vault:
  • You gain {Tunable.S09P02.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.S09P02.HasteDuration}s.
  • You gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.S09P02.ExhaustionDuration}s.

name: Low Profile
description:
When all other Survivors are downed or hooked, for {Tunable.S32P03.EffectDuration}s:
  • You make no Grunts of Pain.
  • You leave no Pools of Blood.
  • You leave no Scratch Marks.

name: Lucky Break
description:
While injured, for up to {Tunable.S20P01.MaxDuration}s:
  • You leave no Pools of Blood.
  • You leave no Scratch Marks.


For each second spent healing another Survivor, recharge the duration by {Tunable.S20P01.TimePerHealingSecond}s.

name: Lucky Star
description:
While hiding in a Locker, you make no Grunts of Pain.

Whenever you exit a Locker, for {Tunable.S39P01.EffectDuration}s:
  • You see the Aura of the closest Generator.
  • You see the Auras of other Survivors.
  • You make no Grunts of Pain.
  • You leave no Pools of Blood.


Cooldown: {Tunable.S39P01.Cooldown}s.

name: Made for This
description:
While injured, whenever you finish healing another Survivor, you gain {Keyword.Endurance} for {Tunable.S37P02.EnduranceDuration}s.

While you have Deep Wound, you gain {Tunable.S37P02.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste}.

name: Mettle of Man
description:
After taking {Tunable.S17P03.TokensNeeded} protection hits, while injured and until you go down, the next time you would be downed by the Killer, take no damage instead.

When you become healthy, while you are at least {Tunable.S17P03.AuraRevealDistance}m from the Killer, they see your Aura.

When the trial starts, you are more likely to be the Obsession.

name: Mirrored Illusion
description: After repairing {Tunable.S42P01.RequiredProgress%}% of Generators, while next to a Chest, Exit Gate Switch, Generator, or Totem, use {Input.ActivatableButton2} to create a static illusion for {Tunable.S42P01.HuskDuration}s.

name: Moment of Glory
description:
After you rummage or unlock {Tunable.S44P03.ChestSearchRequired} Chests, while not {Keyword.Broken}, when you become injured, gain {Keyword.Broken}.

After {Tunable.S44P03.TimeToHeal}s, if you are not downed, you are instantly healed.

name: No Mither
description:
When the trial starts, you become injured, then:
  • You gain {Keyword.Broken}.
  • Your Grunts of Pain are {Tunable.S10P03.InjuredVoiceLevelReduction%}% quieter.
  • You leave no Pools of Blood.
  • You recover {Tunable.S10P03.ExtraRecover%}% faster.
  • You can fully recover.

name: No One Left Behind
description:
When all Generators are completed:
  • You heal {Tunable.SG_No_One_Left_Behind.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • You unhook other Survivors {Tunable.SG_No_One_Left_Behind.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • Whenever you unhook a Survivor, they gain {Tunable.SG_No_One_Left_Behind.IncreasedHaste%}% more {Keyword.Haste}.
  • You see the Auras of other Survivors.

name: Object of Obsession
description:
While you are the Obsession, every {Tunable.S06P03.RevealTimeIntervals}s, the Killer sees your Aura for {Tunable.S06P03.AuraRevealDuration}s.

While the Killer sees your Aura:
  • You see their Aura.
  • You cleanse totems {Tunable.S06P03.ActionSpeedBonus%}% faster.
  • You heal {Tunable.S06P03.ActionSpeedBonus%}% faster.
  • You repair {Tunable.S06P03.ActionSpeedBonus%}% faster.


When the trial starts, you are more likely to be the Obsession.

name: Off the Record
description:
Until all Generators are completed, whenever you are unhooked, for the next {Tunable.S21P01.Duration}s:
  • You gain {Keyword.Endurance}.
  • Your Grunts of Pain are {Tunable.S21P01.InjuredVoiceLevelReduction%}% quieter.
  • The Killer cannot see your Aura.

name: ONE-TWO-THREE-FOUR!
description:
While idle, use {Input.ActivatableButton2} to perform, empowering all Survivors within {Tunable.S49P02.PerformanceDistance}m for up to {Tunable.S49P02.PerformanceDuration}s. While you are performing, other Survivors will see your Aura. You get special Skill Checks during that time: while healing or repairing, basic Skill Checks are {Tunable.S49P02.SkillCheckIncrease%}% more likely to appear.

If you complete the performance, the effect ends after {Tunable.S49P02.EffectDuration}s. Cooldown: {Tunable.S49P02.Cooldown}s.

name: Open-Handed
description: All Survivors see Auras that have a range from {Tunable.S07P01.AuraIncreaseDistance}m farther.

name: Overcome
description:
Whenever you take damage:
  • You retain your speed boost for {Tunable.S29P01.ExtraBoostTime}s longer.
  • You gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.S29P01.ExhaustionDuration}s.

name: Overzealous
description: Whenever you bless or cleanse a Totem, until you take damage, you repair {Tunable.S31P03.ActionSpeedBonus%}% faster. If that Totem was a Hex Totem, the effect is doubled.

name: Parental Guidance
description:
Whenever you stun the Killer, for {Tunable.S30P01.StealthDuration}s:
  • You make no Grunts of Pain.
  • You leave no Pools of Blood.
  • You leave no Scratch Marks.

name: Pharmacy
description:
Whenever you unlock a Chest, it will contain a rare Med-Kit.

You unlock Chests {Tunable.S11P02.SearchSpeeds%}% faster.

The range at which the Killer hears you unlocking Chests is {Tunable.S11P02.NoiseReductionDistance}m shorter.

name: Plot Twist
description:
While injured, crouched and idle, use {Input.ActivatableButton2} to be downed silently.

While downed this way, once per trial:
  • You make no Grunts of Pain.
  • You leave no Pools of Blood.
  • You recover {Tunable.S38P03.RecoverySpeedIncrease%}% faster.
  • You can fully recover.


Whenever you recover this way:
  • You gain {Tunable.S38P03.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.S38P03.HasteDuration}s.
  • You are healed instantly.


When all Generators are completed, you can use this ability once again.

name: Plunderer's Instinct
description:
Within {Tunable.SG_Plunderers_Instinct.ChestAuraRevealDistance}m of locked Chests and dropped items, you see their Auras.


Whenever you unlock a Chest, you are {Tunable.SG_Plunderers_Instinct.ModifyChestRarity}% more likely to find an item of higher rarity.

name: Poised
description:
The first time you start repairing each Generator, you see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S16P02.AuraRevealDuration}s.


Whenever a Generator is completed, you leave no Scratch Marks for {Tunable.S16P02.StealthDuration}s.

name: Potential Energy
description:
While repairing, use {Input.ActivatableButton2} to earn Tokens instead of progress, up to {Tunable.S34P01.MaxTokens} Tokens.

While you have at least {Tunable.S34P01.TokensToActivate} Token, {Input.ActivatableButton2} to spend all Tokens and gain {Tunable.S34P01.ProgressPerToken%}% progress for each Token spent.

Whenever you take damage, lose all Tokens.

name: Power Struggle
description:
While carried by the Killer, while you have at least {Tunable.S24P03.WiggleRequired%}% wiggle and next to an Upright Pallet, you can drop it to stun the Killer.

While downed, you see the Auras of Upright Pallets.

name: Premonition
description: While the Killer is within {Tunable.SG_Premonition.PerkEffectDistance}m of you and inside a {Tunable.SG_Premonition.ActivationAngle} degree cone, whenever you look at them, you hear a sound cue. Cooldown: {Tunable.SG_Premonition.Cooldown}s.

name: Prove Thyself
description: For each other Survivor within {Tunable.S01P03.Range}m of you, all Survivors repair {Tunable.S01P03.RepairBonusPerSurvivor%}% faster.

name: Quick & Quiet
description: You hide in Lockers and vault silently. The Killer is not alerted. Cooldown: {Tunable.S02P01.Cooldown}s.

name: Quick Gambit
description:
While chased by the Killer:
  • You see the Auras of other Survivors.
  • Other Survivors repair {Tunable.S34P03.RepairBoost%}% faster.


Whenever you take damage, cooldown: {Tunable.S34P03.Cooldown}s.

name: Rapid Response
description:
Whenever you fast-exit a Locker, you gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.S46P03.ExhaustionDuration}s.

Whenever you gain {Keyword.Exhausted}, you see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S46P03.AuraRevealDuration}s.

name: Reactive Healing
description: While injured, whenever another Survivor within {Tunable.S32P02.MaximumDistance}m of you takes damage, you gain {Tunable.S32P02.HealingProgressionIncrease%}% missing healing progress.

name: Reassurance
description: Once per Hook State, while within {Tunable.S33P02.RadiusDistance}m of a hooked Survivor, use {Input.ActivatableButton2} to stop the sacrifice progress for {Tunable.S33P02.StrugglePauseDuration}s.

name: Red Herring
description:
After you repair a Generator for at least {Tunable.S21P02.TimeToActivate}s, you see its Aura.

When you hide in a Locker, the Killer is alerted to the Generator. Cooldown: {Tunable.S21P02.Cooldown}s.

name: Repressed Alliance
description: After repairing Generators for {Tunable.S22P03.RepairTimeNeeded}s, while repairing a Generator alone, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to block that generator for {Tunable.S22P03.GeneratorBlockDuration}s.

name: Residual Manifest
description:
Whenever you blind the Killer, they gain {Keyword.Blindness} for {Tunable.S31P02.BlindnessDuration}s.

You can rummage Chests {Tunable.S31P02.MaxRummagePerChest} time. The first time you rummage a Chest, it will contain an uncommon Flashlight.

name: Resilience
description:
While injured:
  • You bless and cleanse Totems {Tunable.SG_Resilience.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • You heal {Tunable.SG_Resilience.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • You open Exit Gates {Tunable.SG_Resilience.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • You repair {Tunable.SG_Resilience.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • You sabotage Hooks {Tunable.SG_Resilience.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • You unhook Survivors {Tunable.SG_Resilience.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • You unlock chests {Tunable.SG_Resilience.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • You vault {Tunable.SG_Resilience.ActionSpeed%}% faster.

name: Resurgence
description: Whenever you are unhooked, you gain {Tunable.S26P02.HealRegain%}% healing progress.

name: Road Life
description:
While injured, not Broken and repairing a Generator:
  • Whenever you hit a basic great Skill Check, you earn {Tunable.S49P01.TokenPerSkillCheck} Token.
  • Whenever you miss a basic Skill Check, you lose {Tunable.S49P01.TokensLostOnSkillCheckFail} token.


When you have {Tunable.S49P01.MaxTokens} Tokens, spend all Tokens to heal {Tunable.S49P01.HealingSpeedIncrease%}% faster until you stop healing.

name: Rookie Spirit
description: After you hit {Tunable.S27P03.SkillchecksRequiredAmount} basic repair Skill Checks, while a Generator is regressing, you see its Aura.

name: Saboteur
description:
Within {Tunable.S04P03.RevealHookDistance}m of where another Survivor was picked-up by the Killer and is being carried, you see the Auras of Hooks and Scourge Hooks.

You can sabotage Hooks. Cooldown: {Tunable.S04P03.Cooldown}s.

name: Scavenger
description:
While repairing and while your Toolbox is empty, whenever you hit a great basic Skill Check, you earn {Tunable.S37P03.TokensPerGreat} Token.

When you have {Tunable.S37P03.MaxTokens} Tokens, spend them all:
  • Your Toolbox is recharged instantly.
  • You repair {Tunable.S37P03.RepairDebuff%}% slower for {Tunable.S37P03.RepairDebuffDuration}s.


You can rummage Chests {Tunable.S37P03.Rummages} time. The first time you rummage a Chest, it will contain an uncommon Toolbox.

name: Scene Partner
description:
While you are within the Killer's Terror Radius, whenever you look at them:
  • Scream, then see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S38P02.AuraRevealDuration}s.
  • There is a {Tunable.S38P02.ChanceOfExtraScream%}% chance you will scream again. If you do, you see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S38P02.ExtraAuraRevealDuration}s more.


Cooldown: {Tunable.S38P02.Cooldown}s.

name: Second Wind
description:
After you heal {Tunable.S18P03.RequiredHealthState} Survivor, while not {Keyword.Broken}, when you are unhooked, you gain {Keyword.Broken}.

After {Tunable.S18P03.DurationOfHeal}s, if you are not downed, you are instantly healed.

name: Self-Care
description: You can heal yourself at {Tunable.S03P03.SelfHealSpeed%}% speed.

name: Self-Preservation
description: Whenever another Survivor is hooked, you gain {Keyword.Elusive} for {Tunable.S25P03.Duration}s.

name: Shattered Hope
description:
Whenever you snuff a Boon Totem:
  • You see the Auras of all Survivors within its range for {Tunable.SG_Shattered_Hope.AuraRevealDuration}s.
  • It is destroyed.

name: Shoulder the Burden
description:
Once per trial, while you do not have {Tunable.S45P03.MaxHooksToDeactivate} Hook States and are next to a hooked Survivor, use {Input.ActivatableButton2} to unhook them:
  • They lose 1 Hook State.
  • You gain 1 Hook State.
  • You scream.
  • You gain {Keyword.Exposed} for {Tunable.S45P03.ExposedDuration}s.

name: Slippery Meat
description: You can attempt to unhook yourself up to {Tunable.SG_Slippery_Meat.ExtraAttempts} times and have {Tunable.SG_Slippery_Meat.HookEscapeChance%}% more chance to succeed.

name: Small Game
description:
Within {Tunable.SG_Small_Game.PerkEffectDistance}m of you, whenever you look at a Totem in a {Tunable.SG_Small_Game.DetectionConeAngle} degree cone, you hear a sound cue. Cooldown: {Tunable.SG_Small_Game.Cooldown}s.

Whenever a Survivor cleanses a Totem, you earn {Tunable.SG_Small_Game.TokensPerTotem} Token, up to {Tunable.SG_Small_Game.MaxTokens}.

For each Token, the cone is {Tunable.SG_Small_Game.ConeAngleReduction} degrees smaller.

name: Smash Hit
description:
Whenever you Pallet-stun the Killer:
  • You gain {Tunable.S25P02.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.S25P02.HasteDuration}s.
  • You gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.S25P02.ExhaustedDuration}s.

name: Sole Survivor
description:
Whenever a Survivor dies, you earn {Tunable.S06P01.TokensPerDeadSurvivor} Token.

For each Token, within {Tunable.S06P01.StealthPerMissingSurvivorDistance}m, the Killer cannot see your Aura.

When all other Survivors are dead:
  • You repair {Tunable.S06P01.RepairSpeedBonus%}% faster.
  • You open Exit Gates and the Hatch {Tunable.S06P01.EscapeActionSpeeds%}% faster.


When the trial starts, you are more likely to be the Obsession.

name: Solidarity
description: While injured and healing another Survivor without a Med-Kit, you also gain healing progress at {Tunable.S16P01.HealRatio}% speed.

name: Soul Guard
description:
While hexed, you can fully recover.

Whenever you fully recover, you gain {Keyword.Endurance} for {Tunable.S22P01.EnduranceDuration}s. Cooldown: {Tunable.S22P01.Cooldown}s.

name: Specialist
description:
Whenever you rummage or unlock a Chest, you earn {Tunable.S43P03.TokensPerChest} Token, up to {Tunable.S43P03.MaxTokens}.

While repairing a Generator, whenever you hit a great basic Skill Check, spend all Tokens. For each Token spent, the Generator gains {Tunable.S43P03.GenChargesRemoved%}% permanent progress.

name: Spies from the Shadows
description: Whenever a Survivor scares a Crow within {Tunable.KG_Spies_From_The_Shadows.NotificationRange}m of you, you are alerted. Cooldown: {Tunable.KG_Spies_From_The_Shadows.Cooldown}s.

name: Spine Chill
description:
Within {Tunable.SG_Spine_Chill.Range}m, whenever the Killer looks at you, you hear a sound cue.

Within {Tunable.SG_Spine_Chill.Range}m, while the Killer is looking at you:
  • You bless and cleanse Totems {Tunable.SG_Spine_Chill.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • You heal {Tunable.SG_Spine_Chill.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • You open Exit Gates {Tunable.SG_Spine_Chill.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • You repair Generators {Tunable.SG_Spine_Chill.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • You sabotage Hooks {Tunable.SG_Spine_Chill.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • You unhook Survivors {Tunable.SG_Spine_Chill.ActionSpeed%}% faster.
  • You unlock Chests {Tunable.SG_Spine_Chill.ActionSpeed%}% faster.

name: Sprint Burst
description:
Whenever you start running:
  • You gain {Tunable.S02P02.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.S02P02.HasteDuration}s.
  • You gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.S02P02.ExhaustionDuration}s.

name: Stake Out
description:
After hiding for {Tunable.S12P03.TokenChargeTime}s within the Killer's Terror Radius, you earn {Tunable.S12P03.TokensGained} Token, up to {Tunable.S12P03.MaxTokens}.

Whenever you hit a good basic Skill Check, spend {Tunable.S12P03.TokensSpent} Token:
  • The good Skill Check becomes a great Skill Check.
  • You gain {Tunable.S12P03.BonusProgress%}% more progress.

name: Still Sight
description:
After being idle for {Tunable.S42P03.RequiredActivationTime}s, within {Tunable.S42P03.RevealDistance}m, until you start moving:
  • You see the Killer's Aura.
  • You see the Auras of Chests.
  • You see the Auras of Generators.

name: Streetwise
description:
The first time you deplete an Item's Charges, you see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S05P03.AuraRevealDuration}s.

Whenever you loot an item from a Chest, it has {Tunable.S05P03.BonusMaxChargePercentages%}% more Charges.

name: Strength in Shadows
description:
While in the Basement:
  • You can heal yourself at {Tunable.S41P02.SelfHealSpeed%}% speed.
  • Whenever you finish healing, you see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S41P02.AuraRevealDuration}s.

name: Teamwork: Collective Stealth
description: Whenever another Survivor finishes healing you, while within {Tunable.S36P03.RequiredDistance}m of each other, you both leave no Scratch Marks. When either of you leaves the range, this ends after {Tunable.S36P03.LingerDuration}s.

name: Teamwork: Full Circuit
description:
For each other Survivor repairing a Generator with you, good basic Skill Check zones are {Tunable.S50P03.SuccessZoneIncreasePerSurvivor%}% bigger.

While repairing with at least 1 other Survivor, you repair {Tunable.S50P03.RepairBonus%}% faster.

name: Teamwork: Power of Two
description: Whenever you finish healing another Survivor, while you stay within {Tunable.S35P03.RequiredDistance}m of each other, you both gain {Tunable.S35P03.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste}. When either of you leaves the range, this ends after {Tunable.S35P03.LingerDuration}s.

name: Teamwork: Soft-Spoken
description:
For each other Survivor repairing a Generator with you, the range of Generator repair noises is {Tunable.S51P03.NoiseReductionPerSurvivor%}% smaller.

While repairing with at least 1 other Survivor, you repair {Tunable.S51P03.RepairBonus%}% faster.

name: Teamwork: Throw Down
description:
Whenever you blind or Pallet-stun the Killer, for {Tunable.S48P03.EffectDuration}s, other injured Survivors within {Tunable.S48P03.EffectDistance}m:
  • Gain {Keyword.Endurance}.
  • See the Killer's Aura.

name: Teamwork: Toughen Up
description:
While injured, whenever another Survivor within {Tunable.S47P03.RequiredDistance}m of you blinds or Pallet-stuns the Killer, for {Tunable.S47P03.Duration}s:
  • You make no Grunts of Pain.
  • You leave no Pools of Blood.
  • You leave no Scratch Marks.

name: Technician
description:
While repairing a Generator:
  • The range of Generator repair noises is {Tunable.S09P01.RepairNoiseDistanceReduction}m shorter.
  • Whenever you miss a basic Skill Check, the Generator does not explode, but loses {Tunable.S09P01.ExtraProgressLost%}% more progress.

name: Tenacity
description:
While downed:
  • You gain {Tunable.S12P01.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste}.
  • You can crawl and recover at the same time.
  • Your Grunts of Pain are {Tunable.S12P01.DyingVoiceLevelReduction%}% quieter.

name: This Is Not Happening
description: While injured, great basic Skill Check zones are {Tunable.SG_This_Is_Not_Happening.GreatZoneSizeBonus%}% bigger.

name: Troubleshooter
description:
While chased by the Killer:
  • You see the Aura of the Generator with the most progress.
  • Whenever you drop a Pallet, you see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S37P01.AuraRevealDuration}s.


When the Killer stops chasing you, this ends after {Tunable.S37P01.LingeringDuration}s.

name: Unbreakable
description:
Once per trial, while downed by the Killer, you can fully recover.

While downed, you recover {Tunable.S08P03.RecoverExtraSpeed%}% faster.

name: Unnerving Presence
description:
Survivors within your Terror Radius get {Tunable.K01P01.SkillcheckOddsIncrease%}% more basic Skill Checks.

The good zone of basic Skill Checks is {Tunable.K01P01.SuccessZoneSizePenalty%}% smaller.

name: Up the Ante
description:
For each other Survivor alive, all Survivors are {Tunable.S07P02.LuckIncrease%}% luckier.

All Survivors can attempt to unhook themselves.

name: Urban Evasion
description: While crouched, you gain {Tunable.S05P02.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste}.

name: Vigil
description:
All Survivors within {Tunable.S11P03.EffectRange}m of you:
  • Lose {Keyword.Blindness} {Tunable.S11P03.RecoveryIncrease%}% faster.
  • Lose {Keyword.Broken} {Tunable.S11P03.RecoveryIncrease%}% faster.
  • Lose {Keyword.Exhausted} {Tunable.S11P03.RecoveryIncrease%}% faster.
  • Lose {Keyword.Exposed} {Tunable.S11P03.RecoveryIncrease%}% faster.
  • Lose {Keyword.Hemorrhage} {Tunable.S11P03.RecoveryIncrease%}% faster.
  • Lose {Keyword.Hindered} {Tunable.S11P03.RecoveryIncrease%}% faster.
  • Lose {Keyword.Mangled} {Tunable.S11P03.RecoveryIncrease%}% faster.
  • Lose {Keyword.Oblivious} {Tunable.S11P03.RecoveryIncrease%}% faster.


After they leave your range, this ends after {Tunable.S11P03.LingerDuration}s.

name: Visionary
description:
Within {Tunable.S23P01.AuraRevealDistance}m of you, you see the Auras of Generators.

Whenever a Generator is completed, cooldown: {Tunable.S23P01.Cooldown}s.

name: Wake Up!
description:
When all Generators are completed:
  • You see the Auras of Exit Gate Switches.
  • While opening an Exit Gate, other Survivors see your Aura.
  • For each Survivor alive, you open Exit Gates {Tunable.S11P01.GateOpenSpeed%}% faster.

name: We See You
description:
Whenever the Killer sees your Aura, you earn {Tunable.S51P02.TokensPerReveal} Token. Cooldown: {Tunable.S51P02.CooldownBetweenTokens}s.

When you have {Tunable.S51P02.MaxTokens} Tokens, spend them all. Then, all Survivors see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S51P02.AuraRevealDuration}s.

name: We'll make it
description: Whenever you unhook a Survivor, for {Tunable.SG_Well_Make_It.Duration}s, you heal other Survivors {Tunable.SG_Well_Make_It.HealingSpeedIncrease%}% faster.

name: We're Gonna Live Forever
description:
You heal downed Survivors {Tunable.S10P01.HealSpeedIncrease%}% faster.

Whenever you finish healing a downed Survivor, they gain {Keyword.Endurance} for {Tunable.S10P01.EnduranceDuration}s. Cooldown: {Tunable.S10P01.EnduranceCooldownDuration}s.

name: Wicked
description:
While in the Basement, you can unhook yourself.

Whenever you are unhooked, you see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S41P03.AuraRevealDuration}s.

name: Windows of Opportunity
description:
Within {Tunable.S13P02.VaultablesRevealDistance}m of you:
  • You see the Auras of Pallets.
  • You see the Auras of Breakable Walls.
  • You see the Auras of Windows.

name: Wiretap
description:
After repairing {Tunable.S32P01.RequiredProgress%}% of Generators, while next to a Generator, use {Input.ActivatableButton2} to trap it for {Tunable.S32P01.TrapDuration}s or until the Killer damages that Generator. All Survivors see that Generator's Aura for that time.

While the Killer is within {Tunable.S32P01.AuraRevealRange}m of that Generator, all Survivors see the Killer's Aura.
